summary: Build NYC's tax-revenue projections are dominated by a handful of large deals each year. Fiscal 2022's high total was driven overwhelmingly by a single transaction with Richmond Medical Center, which alone accounted for about 73% of that year's total; without a comparably sized deal in later years, plus an interest-rate-driven slowdown in bond financings in Fiscal 2024, subsequent years' totals fell well below the Fiscal 2022 level.
